trails.name: Tasman's great taste trail - coastal route
Tasman's great taste trail - rail trail route
Views of tasman bay and days track
Barnicoat walkway
trails.description: This walkway is shared by walkers and mountain bikers, and users should respect one another. The hill is also popular with paragliders, who can sometimes be seen launching themselves from the nearby signposted paragliding area.

trails.name: TIMMS FORKS TO MT FELL HUT RIDGELINE
Mt Ellis bushline to Top Wairoa Hut
Starveall Hut to Starveall Rd route
ISOLATION HUT TO BRIAN BORU ROUTE
Pelorus Track Carpark to Emerald Pool
PIWAKAWAKA TRACK
trails.description: Piwakawaka Track is easy walking track leading from the northern end of Elaine Bay to a small beach.

trails.name: Mt Ellis bushline to Left Branch Mot Riv
L. Wairoa road end to Barrys Flat
Mid Wairoa Hut to Top Wairoa Hut
Bushy Top to Mid Wairoa Hut
ROCKS HUT TO TOTARA SADDLE ROUTE
LAKE CHALICE TO OLD MAN ROUTE
MT FELL TO RICHMOND SADDLE HUT
RICHMOND SADDLE HUT TO JACKSONS CK ROADE
TIMMS CK ROADEND TO TIMMS FORKS

WAKAMARINA - DEVILS CREEK HUT TO FOSTER'
Pelorus Track Captains Hut to Middy Hut
Pelorus Track Middy Hut to Roebuck Hut
Pelorus Track Roebuck Hut to Totara Sadd
Pelorus Track Emerald Pool to Captains H
Devils Hut to Mt Royal Route
ROCKS HUT TO DUN SADDLE ROUTE
Cable Bay Walkway
trails.description: Enjoy the coastal views on this walkway between Rotokura/Cable Bay and The Glen, near Nelson. Boating, sea kayaking, and snorkeling are all possible.

trails.name: Snowdens Bush walk
trails.description: Snowdens Bush is a popular picnic and recreation area.

trails.name: Eves Valley Walk
trails.description: This walking track leads through a rare area of lowland valley floor forest.

trails.name: Hacket Track
trails.description: A day walk up the Hacket Creek valley to Hacket Hut. This track has been badly damaged – there are many slips, take great care.

trails.name: NYDIA TK BUSHEDGE TO UNBRIDGED CREEK
NYDIA TRACK KAIUMA ROADEND TO BUSHEDGE
MT PATRIARCH ROUTE
trails.description: Walk or mountain bike up Mt Patriarch (1,656 m).

trails.name: Opouri Bridle Track
trails.description: Walk or mountain bike through native forest and farmland from Opouri Saddle down to Harvey Bay (Duncan Bay).

trails.name: ARCHER TRACK
trails.description: This walking and mountain biking track passes through native and pine forest from Penzance Bay to Elaine Bay.

trails.name: QCT- BOTTLE BAY TO HEBBERDS BLOCK
QCT- HEBBERDS BLOCK TO TE MAHIA
QCT- ANAKIWA RD END TO BOTTLE BAY
Cullen Point tracks
trails.description: Walk the beautiful loop track for views of Pelorus Sound and Havelock and the short lookout track for views of Mahau Sound.

trails.name: Lake Chalice Hut tracks
trails.description: Explore the area around Lake Chalice, the only lake in Mount Richmond Forest Park - the short, easy walk to the hut is ideal for an overnight tramp with children.

trails.name: Leatham Molesworth Route
trails.description: This mainly unmarked loop route travels the Leatham Conservation Area and into the magnificent Molesworth Recreation Reserve, traversing mountain tops and tussocky valleys.

trails.name: Mt Fishtail Route
trails.description: Climb up to Mt Fishtail (1643 m) via Fishtail Hut.

trails.name: Mt Richmond routes
trails.description: These tracks provide access to Mt Richmond (1760 m) and can be combined for weekend round trip.

trails.name: Mt Sunday/Mt Riley Track
trails.description: Pass over Mt Sunday (1310 m) and Mt Riley (1314 m) on this circuit track.

trails.name: Nydia Track
trails.description: The 27 km Nydia Track offers walkers and cyclists great views and varied track conditions. Plan on an overnight stop at Nydia Bay where you can explore the history and coastline.

trails.name: Old Man Hut Circuit
trails.description: This circuit via Old Man Hut makes a good weekend tramp.

trails.name: Pelorus Bridge Scenic Reserve walking tracks
trails.description: Enjoy beautiful forest and river scenery on one of several walks - there are short, easy options for kids and a river for them to swim in too.

trails.name: Quartz Creek/Mount Royal Route
trails.description: Climb up to the summit of Mount Royal (1366 m).

trails.name: Waikakaho/Cullen Creek Walkway
trails.description: This walkway follows an old goldminer's trail across the range between the Wairau Valley and Linkwater. It can be walked or ridden in one day, but you will need to arrange transport between the road ends.

trails.name: Wakamarina Track
trails.description: Follow in the footsteps of old goldminers on the Wakamarina Track to cross the Richmond Range from the Wairau Valley to the Wakamarina Valley.

trails.name: Mistletoe Bay tracks
trails.description: Take either the James Vogel Track circular walk or the longer round trip on the Peninsula Track.

trails.name: Cable Bay Walkway
trails.description: Enjoy the coastal views on this walkway between Rotokura/Cable Bay and The Glen, near Nelson. Boating, sea kayaking, and snorkeling are all possible.
